title: jasione montana var. humilis
intro: Jasione montana var. humilis, also known as the Dwarf Bluebells or Alpine Bluebells, is a low-growing, flowering plant that belongs to the bellflower family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a natural remedy for respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Jasione montana var. humilis include its ability to soothe respiratory tract infections, reduce inflammation, and improve breathing. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
